summary: Comprehensive testing of Groups feature completed. Backend: 12/12 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All critical flows tested and working (100%). Role filter chips bug fix VERIFIED - all chips fully visible and scrollable. No critical issues found.

react_native_issues.issue: Deprecation warning - TouchableWithoutFeedback is deprecated, should use Pressable

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Groups API fully functional (POST, GET, PUT, DELETE)
✓ Player-group association working correctly with group_id field
✓ Cascade delete working - deleting group deletes all its players
✓ player_count in groups response updates dynamically
✓ Home screen shows groups list with proper navigation
✓ Group detail screen with internal tab switcher (Giocatori/Genera Squadre)
✓ Add player within group context passes groupId correctly
✓ CRITICAL BUG FIX VERIFIED: Role filter chips are fully visible and scrollable (not cut off)
✓ Tab navigation between Players and Teams working smoothly
✓ Team generation within group context working
✓ All testID attributes present for testing
✓ Mobile-first design maintained with proper touch targets
seed_data_creation: Two groups seeded: 'Martedì sera' and 'Giovedì pomeriggio'. Created test group 'TEST_Venerdì Sera' with 1 player during testing (cleaned up after tests).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Groups feature fully functional. Backend APIs handle group CRUD, player-group association, and cascade delete correctly. Frontend shows groups list on home screen, navigates to group detail with internal tabs. Role filter chips bug fix verified - all chips fully visible and scrollable. Team generation works within group context. Legacy players without group_id still exist in database (expected).

tested_flows: Home screen with 'Calcetto Manager' title and groups list
Create group modal with name input and save
Group created and appears in list
Group detail header with back button and group name
Add player button in Players tab
Role filter chips - ALL VISIBLE and scrollable (bug fix verified)
Player appears in group's player list
Generate teams button (correctly disabled when insufficient players)
Edit and delete group buttons visible

bug_fix_verified.issue: Role filter chips were cut off in player list screen
bug_fix_verified.verification: All 5 role filter chips (Tutti, Portiere, Difensore, Centrocampista, Attaccante) are fully visible, scrollable horizontally, and clickable. Tested by scrolling to start and end positions.

backend_endpoints_tested: DELETE /api/groups/{id} - delete group and cascade delete players
POST /api/players with group_id - create player in group
GET /api/players?group_id=xxx&role=yyy - filter by group and role
frontend_screens_tested: Group detail screen (group/[groupId].tsx) - with internal tabs
Add player screen (player/add.tsx) - with groupId parameter
Player detail screen (player/[id].tsx) - within group context
groups_feature_details.navigation_structure: Stack navigation: Home (groups list) → Group detail (with internal tab switcher for Players/Teams). Tab navigation removed in favor of internal tab switcher within group detail.
groups_feature_details.data_isolation: Each group has its own isolated set of players. Players are filtered by group_id. Deleting a group cascades to delete all its players.
